AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 1:24
  |
1 | MATCH (person:Person)<--(message)<-[like]-(:Person)
  |                        ^---

  = expected rel_body}
Cypher: MATCH (person:Person)<--(message)<-[like]-(:Person)
WITH like.creationDate AS likeTime, person AS person
  ORDER BY likeTime, message.id
WITH head(collect({likeTime: likeTime})) AS latestLike, person AS person
RETURN latestLike.likeTime AS likeTime
  ORDER BY likeTime
